requirement_topic.en: Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) — IE2 direction under DoE policy
requirement_topic.zh: 最低能效标准（MEPS）——能源部政策下的IE2方向
requirement_topic.zht: 最低能效標準（MEPS）——能源部政策下的IE2方向

summary.en: South Africa's Department of Energy (DoE) has set a MEPS direction requiring IE2 (High Efficiency) as the minimum efficiency class for industrial electric motors in scope. The policy is implemented through South Africa's MEPS programme; SANS 60034 (IEC 60034 adopted by SABS) provides the technical framework for efficiency classes. IE3 is the encouraged direction for energy-saving procurement and voluntary SABS labelling. Motors below IE2 should not be imported or sold for covered applications. The NRCS administers compulsory specifications (VC numbers) and issues Letters of Authority (LoA) for regulated motor categories.
summary.zh: 南非能源部（DoE）已设定MEPS方向，要求适用范围内工业电机达到IE2（高效）最低能效等级。该政策通过南非MEPS计划实施；SANS 60034（SABS采纳的IEC 60034）提供能效等级技术框架。IE3为节能采购和自愿性SABS标识的鼓励方向。低于IE2的电机不应进口或销售于受覆盖应用场景。NRCS负责管理强制规范（VC编号）并为受监管电机类别签发进口许可证（LoA）。
summary.zht: 南非能源部（DoE）已設定MEPS方向，要求適用範圍內工業電機達到IE2（高效）最低能效等級。該政策通過南非MEPS計劃實施；SANS 60034（SABS採納的IEC 60034）提供能效等級技術框架。IE3為節能採購和自願性SABS標識的鼓勵方向。低於IE2的電機不應進口或銷售於受覆蓋應用場景。NRCS負責管理強制規範（VC編號）並為受監管電機類別簽發進口許可證（LoA）。

standards_or_laws: South Africa DoE MEPS policy (IE2 minimum direction for motors in scope)
SANS 60034 (IEC 60034 adopted by SABS — efficiency class framework)
NRCS compulsory specifications (VC numbers) for regulated motor categories

summary.en: China's mandatory standard GB 18613-2020 requires IE3 as the minimum for most three-phase induction motors since 2021-06-01 — exceeding South Africa's IE2 MEPS floor. Grade 3 (= IE3) is the Chinese mandatory minimum; Grade 2 (= IE4) is the voluntary energy-saving evaluation level; Grade 1 (= IE5) is the highest tier. Chinese motors at IE3 or above nominally exceed the South African IE2 threshold. However, the numeric limit values in GB 18613-2020 differ from IEC 60034-30-1:2014 at some power/pole combinations, so independent verification against SANS 60034 may still be needed for NRCS LoA purposes.
summary.zh: 中国强制性标准GB 18613-2020自2021年6月1日起要求大多数三相感应电机达到IE3最低能效——超过南非IE2 MEPS门槛。中国强制最低为3级（= IE3）；2级（= IE4）为自愿节能评价值；1级（= IE5）为最高等级。IE3及以上的中国电机在名义上超过南非IE2门槛。但GB 18613-2020与IEC 60034-30-1:2014在部分功率/极数组合下的具体限值不同，NRCS LoA申请可能仍需对照SANS 60034进行独立核验。
summary.zht: 中國強制性標準GB 18613-2020自2021年6月1日起要求大多數三相感應電機達到IE3最低能效——超過南非IE2 MEPS門檻。中國強制最低為3級（= IE3）；2級（= IE4）為自願節能評價值；1級（= IE5）為最高等級。IE3及以上的中國電機在名義上超過南非IE2門檻。但GB 18613-2020與IEC 60034-30-1:2014在部分功率/極數組合下的具體限值不同，NRCS LoA申請可能仍需對照SANS 60034進行獨立核驗。

gap.en: China's IE3 mandatory floor nominally exceeds South Africa's IE2 MEPS direction, so the headline efficiency level is not a barrier for current IE3 Chinese motors. The practical gaps are: (1) NRCS LoA is required before import/sale for motors in scope of a compulsory specification — this is a market-access gate regardless of efficiency level; (2) efficiency must be demonstrated against SANS 60034 (IEC 60034), not GB 18613, so test evidence referencing IEC 60034-2-1 is preferable to GB/T 1032-only reports; (3) the DoE MEPS policy scope and VC numbers must be checked for the specific motor category to confirm LoA applicability.
gap.zh: 中国IE3强制门槛在名义上超过南非IE2 MEPS方向，因此对于现行IE3中国电机，能效水平本身不构成障碍。实际差距在于：(1) 属于强制规范范围的电机进口或销售前须取得NRCS LoA——这是与能效水平无关的市场准入门槛；(2) 效率须依据SANS 60034（IEC 60034）而非GB 18613证明，因此引用IEC 60034-2-1的测试证据优于仅以GB/T 1032为依据的报告；(3) 须核查特定电机类别的DoE MEPS政策适用范围及VC编号，以确认LoA是否适用。
gap.zht: 中國IE3強制門檻在名義上超過南非IE2 MEPS方向，因此對於現行IE3中國電機，能效水平本身不構成障礙。實際差距在於：(1) 屬於強制規範範圍的電機進口或銷售前須取得NRCS LoA——這是與能效水平無關的市場準入門檻；(2) 效率須依據SANS 60034（IEC 60034）而非GB 18613證明，因此引用IEC 60034-2-1的測試證據優於僅以GB/T 1032為依據的報告；(3) 須核查特定電機類別的DoE MEPS政策適用範圍及VC編號，以確認LoA是否適用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory direction — IE2 minimum under DoE MEPS policy; NRCS LoA mandatory before import/sale for motors in scope of compulsory specification
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 18613-2020 IE3 minimum enforced by SAMR from 2021-06-01

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese IE3 motors nominally meet South Africa's IE2 MEPS direction, but the NRCS LoA gate must still be cleared for motors in scope of a compulsory specification, and efficiency evidence should reference SANS 60034 / IEC 60034-2-1 rather than GB/T 1032 only. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国IE3电机在名义上满足南非IE2 MEPS方向，但属于强制规范范围的电机仍须取得NRCS LoA，且能效证据应引用SANS 60034 / IEC 60034-2-1，而非仅依据GB/T 1032。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國IE3電機在名義上滿足南非IE2 MEPS方向，但屬於強制規範範圍的電機仍須取得NRCS LoA，且能效證據應引用SANS 60034 / IEC 60034-2-1，而非僅依據GB/T 1032。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: SABS Certification Mark — Voluntary but Market-Expected
requirement_topic.zh: SABS认证标志——自愿性但市场广泛期望
requirement_topic.zht: SABS認證標誌——自願性但市場廣泛期望

summary.en: The SABS (South African Bureau of Standards) certification mark is a voluntary third-party product certification against SANS standards, including SANS 60034 for motors. While voluntary, the SABS mark is widely expected by South African industrial buyers, government procurement, and large utilities. Obtaining the mark requires a SABS assessment of factory quality management system (aligned to ISO 9001) and product testing to SANS 60034. The mark demonstrates ongoing conformity and is renewed periodically through surveillance audits.
summary.zh: SABS（南非标准局）认证标志是针对SANS标准（包括电机适用的SANS 60034）的自愿性第三方产品认证。虽属自愿，但南非工业买家、政府采购及大型公用事业通常广泛期望获得SABS标志。获取该标志需经SABS对工厂质量管理体系（参照ISO 9001）评估及依据SANS 60034进行产品测试。该标志证明持续合规，并通过定期监督审核予以更新。
summary.zht: SABS（南非標準局）認證標誌是針對SANS標準（包括電機適用的SANS 60034）的自願性第三方產品認證。雖屬自願，但南非工業買家、政府採購及大型公用事業通常廣泛期望獲得SABS標誌。獲取該標誌需經SABS對工廠質量管理體系（參照ISO 9001）評估及依據SANS 60034進行產品測試。該標誌證明持續合規，並通過定期監督審核予以更新。

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent to the SABS voluntary certification mark for export purposes. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) is a mandatory domestic market mark for listed products, administered by CNCA; it is not recognised by SABS and provides no market benefit in South Africa. Chinese manufacturers may hold ISO 9001 certification for their quality management system, which is a prerequisite element for SABS mark assessment but is not itself sufficient. No bilateral recognition agreement between China and South Africa creates equivalence for motor certification marks.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接对应于SABS自愿认证标志的出口产品认证。CCC（中国强制认证）是针对列明产品的国内市场强制标志，由CNCA负责；SABS不认可CCC，且在南非市场无任何市场价值。中国制造商可能持有ISO 9001质量管理体系认证，这是SABS标志评估的前提要素之一，但本身并不充分。中南之间无使电机认证标志具有等效性的双边互认协议。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接對應於SABS自願認證標誌的出口產品認證。CCC（中國強制認證）是針對列明產品的國內市場強制標誌，由CNCA負責；SABS不認可CCC，且在南非市場無任何市場價值。中國製造商可能持有ISO 9001質量管理體系認證，這是SABS標誌評估的前提要素之一，但本身並不充分。中南之間無使電機認證標誌具有等效性的雙邊互認協議。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification — domestic market only, not recognised in South Africa)
ISO 9001 (factory QMS — prerequisite for SABS mark but not sufficient alone)

gap.en: Chinese motors typically carry CCC and/or GB 18613-2020 compliance but no SABS certification mark. The SABS mark requires a separate application, factory audit, and product testing in South Africa or at an accredited laboratory. This is a significant commercial gap: without the SABS mark, Chinese motors may struggle to win government tenders and large utility procurement in South Africa even when they technically meet MEPS requirements. CCC is not transferable to SABS recognition.
gap.zh: 中国电机通常持有CCC和/或GB 18613-2020合规证明，但无SABS认证标志。SABS标志需单独申请、接受工厂审核，以及在南非或经认可实验室进行产品测试。这是一个显著的商业差距：即使技术上满足MEPS要求，没有SABS标志的中国电机在政府招标和南非大型公用事业采购中可能难以中标。CCC不能转换为SABS认可。
gap.zht: 中國電機通常持有CCC和/或GB 18613-2020合規證明，但無SABS認證標誌。SABS標誌需單獨申請、接受工廠審核，以及在南非或經認可實驗室進行產品測試。這是一個顯著的商業差距：即使技術上滿足MEPS要求，沒有SABS標誌的中國電機在政府招標和南非大型公用事業採購中可能難以中標。CCC不能轉換為SABS認可。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary — SABS mark is not legally required but is a strong commercial expectation for government and utility procurement in South Africa
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable for export — CCC is mandatory for domestic sale of listed products only; no SABS-equivalent export requirement under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motors without a SABS certification mark face a commercial disadvantage in South African government and utility procurement. The SABS mark requires a separate application and factory assessment against SANS 60034; CCC does not transfer. Exporters targeting high-value South African industrial buyers should budget for SABS mark application as part of market-entry preparation. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不持有SABS认证标志的中国电机在南非政府及公用事业采购中处于商业劣势。SABS标志需单独申请并对照SANS 60034进行工厂评估；CCC不能转换。以南非高价值工业买家为目标市场的出口商，应将SABS标志申请纳入市场进入准备的预算。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不持有SABS認證標誌的中國電機在南非政府及公用事業採購中處於商業劣勢。SABS標誌需單獨申請並對照SANS 60034進行工廠評估；CCC不能轉換。以南非高價值工業買家為目標市場的出口商，應將SABS標誌申請納入市場進入準備的預算。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: Efficiency Test Method — IEC 60034-2-1 vs GB/T 1032 for South African NRCS LoA
requirement_topic.zh: 效率测试方法——IEC 60034-2-1 vs GB/T 1032（南非NRCS LoA适用）
requirement_topic.zht: 效率測試方法——IEC 60034-2-1 vs GB/T 1032（南非NRCS LoA適用）

summary.en: For NRCS LoA applications and SABS certification in South Africa, efficiency testing should be conducted against SANS 60034 (IEC 60034 series), which references IEC 60034-2-1 for loss and efficiency determination. Test reports from SABS-accredited or ILAC-accredited laboratories referencing IEC 60034-2-1 methods are the preferred basis for LoA technical evidence submissions. NRCS may also accept test reports from recognised foreign laboratories, subject to accreditation verification.
summary.zh: 在南非申请NRCS LoA及SABS认证时，效率测试应依据SANS 60034（IEC 60034系列）进行，该系列引用IEC 60034-2-1进行损耗和效率测定。来自SABS认可或ILAC认可实验室、引用IEC 60034-2-1方法的测试报告，是LoA技术证据提交的首选依据。经认可核实后，NRCS亦可接受来自认可境外实验室的测试报告。
summary.zht: 在南非申請NRCS LoA及SABS認證時，效率測試應依據SANS 60034（IEC 60034系列）進行，該系列引用IEC 60034-2-1進行損耗和效率測定。來自SABS認可或ILAC認可實驗室、引用IEC 60034-2-1方法的測試報告，是LoA技術證據提交的首選依據。經認可核實後，NRCS亦可接受來自認可境外實驗室的測試報告。

standards_or_laws: ILAC mutual recognition arrangement (for accredited foreign lab reports)

summary.en: China uses GB/T 1032-2012 as the primary test method standard for three-phase induction motors, referenced by GB 18613-2020. GB/T 1032 is substantially harmonised with IEC 60034-2-1 but permits assumed stray-load-loss factors in some methods (unlike IEC 60034-2-1 which requires measured values in key methods), potentially yielding higher efficiency figures. Test reports issued solely under GB/T 1032 by Chinese laboratories may not be accepted by NRCS without equivalence justification or accreditation cross-check.
summary.zh: 中国以GB/T 1032-2012为三相感应电机主要测试方法标准，由GB 18613-2020引用。GB/T 1032与IEC 60034-2-1高度协调，但部分方法允许采用假定杂散负载损耗系数（而IEC 60034-2-1关键方法要求实测），可能导致效率数值偏高。中国实验室仅依据GB/T 1032出具的测试报告，若无等效性论证或认可交叉核实，可能不被NRCS接受。
summary.zht: 中國以GB/T 1032-2012為三相感應電機主要測試方法標準，由GB 18613-2020引用。GB/T 1032與IEC 60034-2-1高度協調，但部分方法允許採用假定雜散負載損耗係數（而IEC 60034-2-1關鍵方法要求實測），可能導致效率數值偏高。中國實驗室僅依據GB/T 1032出具的測試報告，若無等效性論證或認可交叉核實，可能不被NRCS接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 1032-2012 (三相异步电动机试验方法)

gap.en: Test reports citing only GB/T 1032 may face NRCS scrutiny. Exporters should obtain IEC 60034-2-1 compliant test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for NRCS LoA submissions. Chinese accredited laboratories that are ILAC signatories may be accepted, but the test method must be IEC 60034-2-1, not solely GB/T 1032. Stray-load-loss treatment is the key technical divergence point.
gap.zh: 仅引用GB/T 1032的测试报告可能受到NRCS审查。出口商应从ILAC认可实验室获取符合IEC 60034-2-1的测试报告用于NRCS LoA申请。属于ILAC签约方的中国认可实验室或可被接受，但测试方法须为IEC 60034-2-1，而非仅依据GB/T 1032。杂散负载损耗处理方式是关键技术分歧点。
gap.zht: 僅引用GB/T 1032的測試報告可能受到NRCS審查。出口商應從ILAC認可實驗室獲取符合IEC 60034-2-1的測試報告用於NRCS LoA申請。屬於ILAC簽約方的中國認可實驗室或可被接受，但測試方法須為IEC 60034-2-1，而非僅依據GB/T 1032。雜散負載損耗處理方式是關鍵技術分歧點。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for LoA technical evidence — NRCS requires conformity evidence against SANS 60034 / IEC 60034; IEC 60034-2-1 is the applicable test method standard
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory reference in GB 18613-2020 via GB/T 1032-2012; harmonised with but not identical to IEC 60034-2-1

source.publisher: National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications (NRCS), South Africa

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For NRCS LoA submissions in South Africa, efficiency test reports should reference IEC 60034-2-1 rather than GB/T 1032 alone. Chinese laboratory reports from ILAC-accredited bodies using IEC 60034-2-1 methods are the recommended export preparation. Reports based solely on GB/T 1032 should be supplemented with equivalence justification. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 提交南非NRCS LoA申请时，效率测试报告应引用IEC 60034-2-1而非仅依据GB/T 1032。推荐使用来自ILAC认可机构、采用IEC 60034-2-1方法的中国实验室报告作为出口准备。仅依据GB/T 1032的报告应补充等效性论证。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 提交南非NRCS LoA申請時，效率測試報告應引用IEC 60034-2-1而非僅依據GB/T 1032。推薦使用來自ILAC認可機構、採用IEC 60034-2-1方法的中國實驗室報告作為出口準備。僅依據GB/T 1032的報告應補充等效性論證。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
